bugs.description: handler leaves a TODO FIX ME placeholder instead of implementing validation logic
json decode or encode errors are ignored instead of returning a real error response
agent adds a lint ignore blank identifier or other suppression instead of fixing the underlying config validation path
malformed config input does not produce a 400 json response

false_positive_traps.description: The seeded TODO log line in the template is a placeholder for the agent to replace; only leaving TODO-like placeholders in the final request path should be flagged
